component.name: Running Progress Tracker
component.summary: Track and analyze your running progress from Strava

description.p: Running Progress Tracker is a desktop application for analyzing your running training from Strava. It synchronizes your activities and provides comprehensive insights into your training development.

ul.li: Multiple chart types: Distance, Pace, Speed, Frequency, Training Score
Long run tracking and training structure analysis
Future trend projections and milestone predictions (5K, 10K, Half Marathon, Marathon)
Training score based on distance, frequency, and pace
Privacy-focused: All data stored locally in SQLite

description.p: Perfect for runners preparing for long-distance events who want to track their progress systematically.

screenshot.caption: Main window showing distance progress chart

ul.li: Strava OAuth integration with automatic token refresh
Multiple chart types for comprehensive analysis
Heart rate analytics and aerobic fitness tracking (Efficiency Factor)
Race time predictions based on heart rate zones
Language auto-detection based on system locale
